method_summary: BRACS is a training-free steering framework that monitors a vision-language model's attention to measure visual grounding and applies closed-form corrections to hidden states only when grounding deteriorates.
key_innovation: Barrier-regulated adaptive closed-form steering that intervenes only when needed with analytically computed corrections
best_result: 9.4 points reduction in CHAIR$_s$ and 2.7 points improvement in POPE F1
title: Mitigating Hallucination in Vision-Language Models through Barrier-Regulated Adaptive Closed-form Steering
